goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 16:30'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 16:30
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from london liverpool street
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college
Make sure you get entrance fee
